title: Topsheet comprising natural fibers
abstract: A topsheet (24) for use in an absorbent article (20) has at least a first layer (1). The first layer (1) comprises at least 15% by weight of natural fibers by total weight of the first layer (1). The first layer (1) has a plurality of apertures (5). The first layer (1) comprises land areas (8) between the majority of the apertures (5). The contact angle on the land areas (8) of the first layer (1) between the majority of the apertures (5) is more than 70Ă‚Âş according to the contact angle test method. The topsheet (24) has a run-off of less than 40% according to the run-off test method. The topsheet (24) is adequately dry and absorbs body fluids with low or no run-off.
